messages.content: Answer this
Certainly, I'll do my best to answer your question.
Which tools could you use to determine if an entity is restricted ?select all that apply from the following answers from 1 to 4 . 1_Kics   2_sentinel    3_PHAC   4_GQRMM

To determine if an entity is restricted, the following tools can be used:

1. Kics
2. Sentinel
3. PHAC
4. GQRMM

So, the correct answer would be 1) Kics, 2) Sentinel, 3) PHAC, and 4) GQRMM.

You have assigned as a manager of an engagement what steps must you take  with your investments to ensure independence ? Select all that apply .1_Dispose of any restricted investments before starting work on engagement and update YOUR KICS account account to reflect the disposals    2_you do not need to do anything with your investments if you bought them before the company became a client of KPMG    3_Transfere your investments to your spouse so that you can hold them    4_review your investment portfolio to make sure you do not hold any restricted investments in the client

To ensure independence as a manager of an engagement, the following steps must be taken with your investments:

1. Dispose of any restricted investments before starting work on the engagement and update your KICS account to reflect the disposals.
4. Review your investment portfolio to make sure you do not hold any restricted investments in the client.

So, the correct answers would be 1) Dispose of any restricted investments before starting work on the engagement and update your KICS account to reflect the disposals, and 4) Review your investment portfolio to make sure you do not hold any restricted investments in the client.

Sigit is a partner . His dependent son wants to try making investments using an app on his mobile what must Sigit do?   1_advise him that before selecting any investments he must check with sigit who will check KICS to determine if the investment restricted    2_ advise his son that the amounts invested must be less than $100 so he can clearly demonstrate they are not material   3_ nothing mobile phone apps are typically online games and not used for investment purposes    4_ Record the name of the app in KICS

If Sigit is a partner and his dependent son wants to try making investments using an app on his mobile, Sigit must:

1. Advise him that before selecting any investments, he must check with Sigit who will check KICS to determine if the investment is restricted.
2. Advise his son that the amounts invested must be less than $100 so he can clearly demonstrate they are not material.

So, the correct answers would be 1) Advise him that before selecting any investments, he must check with Sigit who will check KICS to determine if the investment is restricted, and 2) Advise his son that the amounts invested must be less than $100 so he can clearly demonstrate they are not material.

Which tool can you use to check if the entity is restricted prior to making an investment in the entity ?1_ KICS 2_Success factor  3_ The quality and risk management manual    4_partner rotation system

The tool that can be used to check if an entity is restricted prior to making an investment in the entity is:

1) KICS (KPMG Independence Compliance System)

What are the consequences if you personally  violate or breach indepence rules? Select all that apply    1_you can start earning revenue sooner   2_You may lose a KPMG  Client and be disciplined by a regulator    3_your performance rating will improve      4_ You may be disciplined by your KPMG Firm

The consequences if an individual personally violates or breaches independence rules are:

1) You may lose a KPMG client and be disciplined by a regulator.
4) You may be disciplined by your KPMG firm.

So, the correct answers would be 2) You may lose a KPMG client and be disciplined by a regulator, and 4) You may be disciplined by your KPMG firm.

Select all answers that  correctly fill in the blank . Being independent..... 1_includes the appearance of independence    2 _ is expected as part of ethical and professional behavior    3_is required for audit partners and managers only    4_ means our audit and assurance work is objective

The correct answers to fill in the blank are:

1) Includes the appearance of independence.
2) Is expected as part of ethical and professional behavior.
4) Means our audit and assurance work is objective.

Your friend has informed you that there is a new cryptocurrency is  launching next week . You want to invest in this new product . What will you do before making this purchase ?    1_cryptocurrency is not subject to independence rules ,so you may proceed without additional actions  2_  KPMG does not allow the purchase of Cryptocurrency    3_consult with your Performance manager    4_ Conault with your local Q&RM independence team to understand any independence implications

Before making a purchase of the new cryptocurrency, you should:

4) Consult with your local Q&RM (Quality & Risk Management) independence team to understand any independence implications.

So, the correct answer would be to consult with your local Q&RM independence team to understand any independence implications before making the purchase.

Which of the following items suggest that you might have a spousal equivalent? SELECT ALL TAHT APPLY .   1_you have been cohabting and have had a child together    2_ you  have a legal contract together that states that you are spousal equivalent    3_ you have a roommate that you are not romantically involved with    vb4_ you represent vourselves  as spousal equivalents to voucher families and friends

The items that suggest that you might have a spousal equivalent are:

1) You have been cohabiting and have had a child together.
2) You have a legal contract together that states that you are spousal equivalents.
4) You represent yourselves as spousal equivalents to voucher families and friends.

So, the correct answers would be 1) You have been cohabiting and have had a child together, 2) You have a legal contract together that states that you are spousal equivalents, and 4) You represent yourselves as spousal equivalents to voucher families and friends.

Which of the following may be considered an indirect investment?   Q_an ownership stake that you hold in your family business    2_stock that you dependent child received as a birthday gift    3_ Investments made by a fund that you hold where you do not directly own the underlying assets and have no control or ability to influence the funds investment   4_ Shares In a public company that were purchased by your spouse

The following may be considered an indirect investment:

3) Investments made by a fund that you hold where you do not directly own the underlying assets and have no control or ability to influence the fund's investment.
4) Shares in a public company that were purchased by your spouse.

So, the correct answers would be 3) Investments made by a fund that you hold where you do not directly own the underlying assets and have no control or ability to influence the fund's investment, and 4) Shares in a public company that were purchased by your spouse.

You have just become the power of attorney to your mother who is ill . She has several investments in restricted entities that you are a covered person for. Can your mother continue to hold these investments?  1_no as you now considered to have a control over your mother investments    2_yes ,because the investments were  obtained by your mother prior to you becoming a covered person    3_ it depends on whether or not you helped your mother with the investment decision    4_yes, because you do not work on the audit engagement for the entity

As a power of attorney for your mother, if she has several investments in restricted entities and you are a covered person for those entities, the correct answer is:

1) No, as you are now considered to have control over your mother's investments.

As a covered person, you are subject to the same independence rules and restrictions as if you held those investments directly. Therefore, you cannot continue to hold these investments on behalf of your mother.

Which of the following financial relations would impact your independence ?   Select all that apply .   1 _stocks that your dependent child received as a birthday gift    2_your dependent child's investments made using using a smartphone app.   3_your spouse's pension investments.    4_your non dependent brother's investment in a client

The following financial relations would impact your independence:

2) Your dependent child's investments made using a smartphone app.
3) Your spouse's pension investments.
4) Your non-dependent brother's investment in a client.

So, the correct answers would be 2) Your dependent child's investments made using a smartphone app, 3) Your spouse's pension investments, and 4) Your non-dependent brother's investment in a client.

Which factor do you consider when planning an audit response if you decide to obtain information at period _end rather than at the interim period ?    1_sufficently   2_ Nature    3_ Timijg     4 _  Extent

The factor to consider when planning an audit response if you decide to obtain information at period-end rather than at the interim period is:

3) Timing

Timing refers to the point in time when the audit procedures are performed, such as whether the information is obtained at the interim period or at the period-end.
